studies.title: Open-label, controlled, randomized, multicenter study to demonstrate the effect of the INKA digital therapy companion on symptoms of overactive bladder (with or without urinary incontinence).

_verification.reason: The study is specifically about the INKA digital therapy companion, as evidenced by the repeated mention of the product name 'INKA' in the title, full text, and trial registration. The study aims to demonstrate the effect of the INKA app on symptoms of overactive bladder.

_classification.reason: The study is described as an 'open-label, controlled, randomized, multicenter study', indicating that it is an interventional, experimental study with random allocation of participants to intervention and control groups, which is characteristic of an RCT.

studies.title:
Systematic evaluation of a CE certified digital therapy
companion for patients suffering from overactive bladder
(OAB) with or without urinary incontinence (UI) or in
combination with stress urinary incontinence (mixed
incontinence)

_verification.reason: The study specifically evaluates the INKA app, a digital health application for patients with overactive bladder, as indicated by the trial title, description, and intervention details. The INKA app is explicitly named and described as the intervention being tested.

_classification.reason: The study involves an intervention with a digital therapy app and includes random allocation of participants to either the intervention group (receiving the app) or a control group (not receiving the app), which is characteristic of a randomized controlled trial.
